field_notes.phase: Roadmap phase identifier such as P17.
field_notes.evidence_id: Stable local evidence identifier without private paths.
field_notes.evidence_type: One of model-run, bridge-run, patch-trial, github-microtask, smoke-check, or planning-audit.
field_notes.generated_utc: UTC timestamp for the sanitized summary.
field_notes.source_runtime_paths: Repo-relative ignored paths only; never absolute workstation paths.
field_notes.ticket_family: Marker, structured-output, patch-proposal, restricted-tool, GitHub microtask, or other bounded family.
field_notes.models_or_agent_host: Sanitized model IDs or agent host names.
field_notes.bridge_or_harness: Script or bridge surface used to produce the evidence.
field_notes.allowed_authority: What the worker or harness was allowed to do.
field_notes.forbidden_authority: What was explicitly out of scope.
field_notes.verification: Supervisor commands, inspections, checks, and blockers.
field_notes.promotion_boundary: Raw evidence retention path and private-value exclusions.
field_notes.supervisor_decision: accept, retry, reject, blocked, or defer with rationale.
field_notes.accepted_claims: Optional list of claims the supervisor accepts as evidence-supported.
field_notes.rejected_claims: Optional list of unsupported or contradicted worker claims.
field_notes.needs_evidence_claims: Optional list of claims that may be useful but need more evidence before promotion.

privacy_rules: Do not include provider URLs, access headers, tokens, raw transcripts, or personal workstation paths.
Do not paste raw assistant messages unless they are explicitly sanitized and short enough for public review.
Use repo-relative ignored runtime paths when referring to raw evidence.
Record classifications and counts before narrative interpretation.
